name: aggregator follows regular symlinks pointing to source-file YAMLs
setup:
cat > external/external.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: ext
  authoritative_publisher: External
  authoritative_url: https://example.com/ext
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-10T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:ext
rules:
  - id: linked-rule
    name: linked
    description: rule reached via symlink.
    detector: rubric/detectors/linked.sh
recommended_set: [linked-rule]
all_set: [linked-rule]
EOF
